zh.Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Camville於1239年之前出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾時，他的父親William de Camville19歲，母親Lucy23歲。他於1257年與Maud Brienne在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1295年被列為member of parliament 。他去世於大約1308年9月21日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾阿洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Camville was born before 1239, in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Camville, was 19 and his mother, Lucy, was 23. He married Maud Brienne in 1257, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1295, his occupation is listed as member of parliament . He died about 21 September 1308, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Arrow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Maud Brienne en 1257, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1295, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament . Il est décédé environ 21 septembre 1308, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Arrow, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Camvilleが1239年以前にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン カンプヴィルで生まれた時，父William de Camvilleは19歳，母Lucyは23歳であった。1257年にイギリスイギリスデボンでMaud Brienneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1295年，職業はmember of parliament と記録されている。彼は約1308年9月21日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアローにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Camville(이)가 1239년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 캠p빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Camville(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Maud Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1295년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament 이었다. 그는 대략 1308년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 아로에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Maud Brienne em 1257, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1295, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament . ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Camville родился перед 1239 г. в местности клифтон кампвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Camville было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Brienne в 1257 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1295 году он работал по профессии member of parliament . Он умер около 21 сентября 1308 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности арроу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
